NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-31-2007 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 501. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-19-2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-25-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-31-2007 - BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT RONALD OWENS' MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN IN GOOD FAITH PLEAD THAT DEFENDANTS LEAVING THE SCENE OF THE ACCCIDENTAL CAUSED HER INJURY NOT ALREADY SUFFERED AS A RESULT OF THE ACCIDENT ITSELF AND THAT DEFENDANTS DOING SO OTHERWISE MEETS THE CRITERIA OF CIVIL CODE 3294. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR 6840
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEWOL, CAMILLA AS TO DEFENDANT OWENS, RONALD DOES 1 TO 100
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-22-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-03-2007 - BY COURT.

MOTION To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT RONALD OWENS' MOTION To Strike Portions Of Complaint IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN IN GOOD FAITH PLEAD THAT DEFENDANTS LEAVING THE SCENE OF THE ACCCIDENTAL CAUSED HER INJURY NOT ALREADY SUFFERED AS A RESULT OF THE ACCIDENT ITSELF AND THAT DEFENDANTS DOING SO OTHERWISE MEETS THE CRITERIA OF CIVIL CODE 3294. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR 6840
